name: Goa
description: Beautiful coastal state with beaches, churches and Portuguese heritage. Known for nightlife, water sports and seafood restaurants.

name: Manali
description: Hill station in Himachal Pradesh. Perfect for adventure sports, trekking, and scenic mountain views. Great for families and adventure seekers.

name: Bali
description: Tropical island known for beaches, rice terraces, temples and vibrant culture. Budget-friendly and great for all types of travelers.
